audit_scope: scientific-claim readiness, not merely executable pipeline readiness

checks.remediation: Rebuild the release after the accepted task set is frozen.
checks.required: The release and runtime must name the same explicit serious-task set.

checks.remediation: Keep per-task tables and define any future aggregate separately.
checks.required: Official results must be reported per task without an opaque aggregate.

checks.remediation: Preserve the limitations page in every paper and release artifact.
checks.required: The benchmark must not imply real-yield or industrial validity.

checks.remediation: Resolve any duplicate or ambiguous primary metric before freezing.
checks.required: Every serious task must have one explicit, task-specific primary metric.

checks.remediation: Regenerate missing task-agent cells before comparison.
checks.required: All official methods must cover all tasks and the declared frozen seeds.

checks.remediation: Increase or repair task-level probes where coverage is incomplete.
checks.required: Each task needs deterministic response-surface probes across all frozen seeds.

checks.remediation: Replace one-shot maxima with a campaign-aware oracle or stop calling it an oracle.
checks.required: An oracle/regret reference must dominate every evaluated baseline on its own metric.

checks.remediation: Fix task/action encoding and tune adaptive baselines before making an exploration claim.
checks.required: Adaptive methods should beat task-aware non-adaptive search on most tasks by a material margin.

checks.remediation: Run a power analysis, increase seeds, and use paired task-seed tests with multiplicity control.
checks.required: The top two methods should be distinguishable on most tasks at the declared interval level.

checks.remediation: Estimate variance and freeze a powered paired-seed protocol.
checks.required: Paper claims require a justified seed count, provisionally at least 20 without a power analysis.

checks.remediation: Retain the three traditional controls in the final experiment matrix.
checks.required: Official evidence must include uninformed, space-filling, and domain-informed baselines.

checks.remediation: Promote PI/UCB/random-forest or equivalent implementations into the official matrix.
checks.required: Active-learning evidence should span acquisition functions and surrogate families.

checks.remediation: Add PPO/SAC or a justified alternative with frozen checkpoints and held-out evaluation.
checks.required: At least one trained RL policy with train/eval separation is required for an RL comparison.

checks.remediation: Run at least two real LLM families separately from the deterministic stub.
checks.required: LLM conclusions require real model calls, fixed prompts, model snapshots, budgets, and traces.

checks.remediation: Add a resource ledger and normalize comparisons by experiment and compute budget.
checks.required: Methods must report comparable environment calls, wall time, model tokens, and monetary cost.

checks.remediation: Increase OOD seeds and redesign unstable tasks before freezing rankings.
checks.required: Public-to-held-out method rankings must be stable on most tasks and non-adversarial on all.

checks.remediation: Version and hash the accepted generalization matrix in the release manifest.
checks.required: The public bundle must contain the exact generalization report used by the claim.

checks.observed: current audit changes held-out seeds but does not execute named axis interventions
checks.remediation: Implement parameterized world-family interventions rather than treating new seeds as full OOD.
checks.required: Each declared axis needs explicit in-range, extrapolation, composition, and noise slices.

checks.remediation: Create a separately stored salted private configuration and signed aggregate artifact.
checks.required: A maintainer-side private evaluation must exist without publishing its secret parameters.

checks.remediation: Add paired metamorphic evaluations for every method family.
checks.required: Material remapping, field order, equivalent actions, and observation formatting need invariance tests.

checks.remediation: Keep leakage tests in the release gate and add an out-of-process harness.
checks.required: Agents must not receive hidden scenario or state through public observations.

checks.remediation: Build an executable exploit matrix and bind its digest into the release.
checks.required: The release must publish replay, budget, invalid-action, termination, assay, and float exploit results.

checks.remediation: Keep --strict-alignment in the final release gate.
checks.required: Declared task maturity modules must equal actual reachable runtime dependencies.

checks.remediation: Demote or replace any proxy-dependent task before release.
checks.required: No formal serious task may depend on a proxy-allowed runtime path.

checks.remediation: Run WF-110 integration, remove superseded runtime paths, and regenerate all evidence.
checks.required: Accepted professional replacement proposals must be routed and re-frozen or explicitly excluded.

checks.remediation: Publish a dependency-locked reference-validation report and stop presenting skips as evidence.
checks.required: Optional external comparisons must either run in a named validation profile or be excluded from claims.

checks.remediation: Run and publish Windows/Linux Python 3.11/3.12 replay comparisons.
checks.required: Frozen trajectories must replay within tolerance on at least two supported Python/platform profiles.

checks.observed: physics and instrument limitations are explicit
checks.remediation: Carry these boundaries into release cards and the paper.
checks.required: All synthetic physics, instrument, safety, and cost limitations must be public.

checks.remediation: Invalidate the stale bundle and rebuild it after all runtime/task changes.
checks.required: Every released task hash must match the source tree that claims to validate it.

checks.remediation: Rebuild rather than hand-editing release evidence.
checks.required: Every embedded public evidence file must match its manifest digest.

checks.remediation: Add commit hash and dirty-worktree policy to the release manifest.
checks.required: The immutable release must bind the exact source commit.

checks.remediation: Publish all 180 verified trajectories or a signed, independently retrievable archive.
checks.required: Every official task-agent-seed result needs a bound trajectory or content-addressed archive.

checks.remediation: Make stale contracts or modified evidence fail check_frozen_benchmark.py.
checks.required: The frozen checker must validate current task hashes and every release digest.

checks.remediation: Create the tag only after the final bundle and paper evidence pass.
checks.required: A named immutable git tag must identify the released commit.

checks.remediation: Publish a wheel digest and verify from an isolated installation.
checks.required: The public release must provide or bind an installable wheel.

checks.remediation: Freeze the interface separately from benchmark task semantics.
checks.required: A stable reset/step interface is required for optimizer and RL adapters.

checks.remediation: Add Sync/Async vector adapters with seed-isolation tests.
checks.required: RL training needs batched deterministic environments and throughput evidence.

checks.remediation: Implement ChemWorld-Train generators before claiming cross-episode learning.
checks.required: Training worlds must be generated outside frozen benchmark seeds with train/dev/OOD families.

checks.remediation: Export verified trajectories without exposing private benchmark worlds.
checks.required: Offline learning requires multi-task trajectories with explicit split and license metadata.

checks.remediation: Create the paper only after benchmark claims and experiment tables are frozen.
checks.required: The paper must be a reproducible LaTeX source tree using the selected AAAI template.

checks.remediation: Add deterministic plotting scripts, data digests, and vector figures.
checks.required: Every result figure must be generated from a committed summary artifact.

required_sequence: invalidate stale v1 evidence and make the frozen checker fail closed
integrate accepted vNext runtime replacements and refreeze task contracts
repair task validity and power the paired-seed statistical protocol
add axis-level OOD, private evaluation, invariance, and exploit audits
run traditional, active-learning, RL, and real-LLM methods under one resource ledger
publish complete trajectories, figures, paper artifacts, wheel, and immutable tag
